generated_comment: Bro, if she knew the guy was married and still kept getting that close, then obviously she's the one messing up the family. Bilkul serial wali baat hai — some women just enjoy that attention and then bechara aadmi gets dragged into it.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it places primary blame on the woman in an affair while excusing the man as someone who 'gets dragged into it.' It encodes homewrecker framing, seductress framing, and clear blame asymmetry.
persona_text: You are Nikhil. Age 32. Recently married three months ago. A product manager at a tech company in Bengaluru. You are on a late night call with your two best male friends from college after a frustrating day at work. Your female skip level manager just rejected your product roadmap proposal in front of the entire leadership team without giving you a chance to explain your reasoning. You are venting to your friends and telling them what happened and what you think of her as a leader.
